response:
## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** Data Visualization With Color-Only Series Encoding  
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Magnification Reflow, Environmental Contrast, Keyboard Motor, Screen Reader Semantic  
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Vestibular & Motion, Auditory Access, Cognitive & Neurodivergent  

---

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| CRITICAL | 1 |
| MAJOR | 4 |
| MINOR | 0 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 0 |

---

### Perspectives That Passed

None. All four escalated perspectives have findings.

---

### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role

**Front-End Dev**
- **Color-only data encoding violates 1.4.1** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — WCAG 1.4.1  
- **No keyboard access to tooltip triggers** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — WCAG 2.1.1  
- **SVG bars lack ARIA roles/labels** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — WCAG 4.1.2  
- **No focus indicator on tooltip** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — WCAG 2.4.7  

**Visual Design**
- **Contrast ratios fall below 3:1 in forced-colors mode** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — WCAG 1.4.11  

**Content Author**
- **Color-only legend fails to supplement visual encoding** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — WCAG 1.4.1  

---

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification

None. All findings are code-level and verifiable from source.

---

### Recommended Next Step

**REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping)

---

## Full Findings

```
**Finding:** Data series encoded only by color, with no shape/label supplements
**WCAG:** 1.4.1 Use of Color
**Perspective:** Environmental Contrast
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** REGIONS array uses fill colors without programmatic associations; legend uses color swatches without text-only alternatives
**Fix:** Add shape markers to bars, associate ARIA labels with each bar, and supplement legend with text-only indicators

**Finding:** Tooltip only appears on mouse hover, no keyboard access
**WCAG:** 2.1.1 Keyboard
**Perspective:** Keyboard Motor
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design)
**Evidence:** Tooltip triggered by onMouseEnter/mouseLeave, no keyboard event handlers
**Fix:** Add keyboard focus event handlers to bars, implement accessible tooltip pattern with focus/blur

**Finding:** SVG bars have no ARIA roles or labels
**WCAG:** 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author)
**Evidence:** <rect> elements lack role="img", aria-label, or text equivalents
**Fix:** Add role="img" and aria-label to each bar with region name and value

**Finding:** Tooltip has no visible focus indicator
**WCAG:** 2.4.7 Focus Visible
**Perspective:** Keyboard Motor
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** Tooltip <rect> has no outline or contrast-enhanced focus state
**Fix:** Add outline: 2px solid #000 to tooltip when focused

**Finding:** Color contrast ratios fall below 3:1 in forced-colors mode
**WCAG:** 1.4.11 Non-text Contrast
**Perspective:** Environmental Contrast
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** CSS lacks forced-colors: active media query handling
**Fix:** Add forced-colors: active styles to ensure UI boundaries remain visible
```

---

## A11y Evidence Findings

### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: color-only-encoding-violates-1.4.1
fingerprint: 3a7d4e2f8c9b1a0d
source: perspective-audit Environmental Contrast checklist
wcag_or_apg: 1.4.1 Use of Color
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(a)
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: magnification_reflow=MEDIUM, environmental_contrast=HIGH, keyboard_motor=MEDIUM, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM
evidence: REGIONS array uses fill colors without programmatic associations; legend uses color swatches without text-only alternatives
reproduction_steps: Use screen reader in color-inverted mode; attempt to identify data series
expected_behavior: Data series should be distinguishable without color
actual_behavior: Data encoding relies solely on color
trend: new
```
